creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
It's very strange that you are getting fetch errors, as I just did it here 
without the distfiles:

[7:43:17 kirby /kirby/shared/ports/mingw32-bin-msvcrt]# make makesum
=> mingwrt-3.17-mingw32-dev.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in 
/usr/ports/distfiles/mingw.
=> Attempting to fetch from 
http://heanet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/mingw/MinGW%20Runtime/mingwrt-3.17/.
mingwrt-3.17-mingw32-dev.tar.gz               100% of  547 kB  138 kBps
=> mingwrt-3.17-mingw32-dll.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in 
/usr/ports/distfiles/mingw.
=> Attempting to fetch from 
http://heanet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/mingw/MinGW%20Runtime/mingwrt-3.17/.
mingwrt-3.17-mingw32-dll.tar.gz               100% of 6693  B   54 kBps
=> w32api-3.14-mingw32-dev.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in 
/usr/ports/distfiles/mingw.
=> Attempting to fetch from 
http://heanet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/mingw/MinGW%20API%20for%20MS-Windows/w32api-3.14/.
w32api-3.14-mingw32-dev.tar.gz                100% of 1594 kB   35 kBps 00m00s

I notice that yours says it is still using 
http://xxx.dl.sourceforge.net/sourceforge/xxx instead of 
http://xxx.dl.sourceforge.net/project/xxx. I don't think it's a problem with the 
port.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
